calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Machado for and with (petitioner) Lawrence Lanctot.

The court indicated that it has no problem with restrictions on use of funds. The parties presented oral argument and explained services provided/performed to support their positions with regard to fees, and also addressed the issue of dual compensation. The parties elected not to amend their petition. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-13-2015 Continued To Feb-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-30-2014 Continued To Jan-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-16-2014 Continued To Dec-30-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition By Executor For Prior Approval Of Right To Compensation For Services As Executor And For Services As Attorney For The Executor
Off Calendar Jul-24-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Watson for and with (petitioner) Lawrence Lanctot.

Mr. Watson stated that the request for fees was late because he was not aware of Local Rule 14.95A regarding dual compensation. He also mentioned that Ms. Sabatou signed an agreement signed an agreement on November 20, 1999 to have her attorney be the executor of her estate, and to receive attorney's as well as executor's fees. Mr. Watson also explained that the firm will not receive any legal or executor fees and that Mr. Lanctot will be getting both. The petition for approval of right to compensation for services as executor and as attorney was taken under submission pending the filing of the 1999 document.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition By Executor For Prior Approval Of Right To Compensation For Services As Executor And For Services As Attorney For The Executor
